# hetzner-robot_server_addons (Data Source)

Lists add-on products orderable for an existing server (`GET /order/server_addon/{server-number}/product`). Use an add-on `id` with `hetzner-robot_server_addon_order`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner-robot_server_addons" "avail" {
  server_number = 2093885
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) Server number to list add-ons for

### Read-Only

- `addons` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--addons))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--addons"></a>
### Nested Schema for `addons`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `price_gross` (String)
- `price_net` (String)
- `type` (String)
